narrative:
Precinct Ottawa Hills 3 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,215 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
